A '''Krath blood blade''' was a weapon of the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] cult. These weapons were specifically to resistant to an attack from a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and as such the metal was weaved with [[cortosis]] ore. These weapons were often used by Krath assassins and many Sith believed that the weapon predated the lightsaber.

Other Krath weaponry include the [[Krath dire sword|dire sword]], the [[Krath Double Sword|double sword]], and the [[Krath war blade|war blade]].
